title: Carnegie Mellon University Usable Privacy and Security Laboratory
body: The Carnegie Mellon University Usable Privacy and Security Laboratory (CUPS) is a research centre at Carnegie Mellon University. Its research is focused on developing methods to make security systems more usable and intuitive.
